---
title: "Macro Scenario Monitoring"
subtitle: "Vol. 1 | Investment branch"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
.investment-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1rem;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
}

.investment-card {
  padding: 1rem 1.05rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(25, 48, 56, 0.1);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
}

.investment-card h3 {
  margin: 0.15rem 0 0.55rem;
}

.page-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.7rem;
}

.page-note {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
</style>

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">Macro Scenario Monitoring</p>
<h2>Vol. 1 | Investment branch</h2>
<p>This branch treats the U.S.-Iran war as a sell-side macro forecasting problem. The aim is to use a transparent scenario model, daily market confirmation, and core macro indicators to decide whether the desk should revise its growth, inflation, Fed, and cross-asset view.</p>
<div class="page-actions">
<a href="working_papers.html">Back to Vol. 1 hub</a>
<a href="macro_scenario_commodity.html">Open commodity branch</a>
<a href="generated/snapshot.json">Snapshot JSON</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">Sell-side use</p>
<h3>What this branch is built to show</h3>
<div class="investment-grid">
<div class="investment-card">
<h3>Forecast revision</h3>
<p>The desk updates the base case and alternative scenarios for growth, inflation, and the Fed as new information arrives.</p>
</div>
<div class="investment-card">
<h3>Desk briefing</h3>
<p>The output is meant to brief sales, trading, and clients with a clear answer to what changed and why it matters.</p>
</div>
<div class="investment-card">
<h3>Cross-asset mapping</h3>
<p>Rates, FX, credit, and equities are used as confirmation channels, not as disconnected charts.</p>
</div>
</div>
<p class="page-note">This is the live branch of Vol. 1. The snapshot below is rebuilt from public data and explicit scenario scoring.</p>
</div>

{{< include generated/decision_risk_ai_snapshot.md >}}

{{< include generated/indicator_playbook.md >}}
